The '''Bavos-II heavy-duty military space platform''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] developed by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]].

==Description==
The second line of defense platforms, the Bavos-II was an improvement over its predecessor, the [[Bavos-I heavy-duty military space platform|Bavos-I]]. At 2,500 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, they were armed with 100 turreted medium [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, 100 anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] turbolasers, and three turreted [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher banks. It also possessed a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay capable of launching up to six squadrons of starfighters, and a squadron-and-a-half of [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]]. It possessed more cargo space then the Bavos-I, making it much more self sufficient than its predecessor.<ref name="Far Orbit Project" />

{{Station-stub}}
